prompt: A maintenance bot operates in a refrigerated warehouse maintaining conveyor motors. It must warm up sensors for 30 seconds before measurements. If temperature drops below −25°C, it enters standby mode until heating pads raise it above −15°C. The robot performs vibration analysis for each motor and logs anomalies. It is always possible for the bot to recover from standby to active operation.
constraints: FrostBot warms sensors for 30 s before measurements
FrostBot performs vibration analysis for each motor
FrostBot logs anomalies for each motor
Always possible to recover from standby to active
